privileged_info_summary: The conference_schedule dataset is synthetic. It contains 2 conferences ('Global Graph Summit 2026' and 'Travel Tech World') with 4 total sessions. The data is created dynamically during task setup at /home/ga/conference_data.json. Global Graph Summit 2026 is hosted at Hotel Artemide with 2 sessions (Scaling OrientDB Clusters duration 45 min, Graph Algorithms in Practice duration 60 min) presented by luca.rossi@example.com and sophie.martin@example.com. Travel Tech World is hosted at The Savoy with 2 sessions (Recommender Systems 101 duration 30 min, The Future of Booking duration 50 min) presented by david.jones@example.com and luca.rossi@example.com. Required schema includes 5 classes: Conferences and Sessions (vertices), HostedAt, HasSession, and PresentedBy (edges).
